slides.title: Eat some *carbs*
slides.body: Carbs 1 to 2 hours before fuel your lifts.

slides.title: Add *protein*
slides.body: A little protein primes muscle growth.

slides.title: Time it *right*
slides.body: Big meal 1 to 2 hours out, light snack closer.

slides.title: *Caffeine* helps
slides.body: A coffee pre-lift boosts strength and focus.

slides.title: Don't go *heavy*
slides.body: Too much too close means a sluggish session.

slides.title: Fuel the *work*.
slides.body: Snap your meals and Vibe Health tracks the fuel for you.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
